title: Incir Reçeli 2
overview: After losing his great love Duygu and spiraling into despair despite directing the film İncir Reçeli, Metin’s nights of singing his own songs at a bar take a turn when newcomer bartender Gizem arrives. Both scarred by past heartbreaks, Metin and Gizem must learn to trust and heal if they are to discover whether a new love can blossom between them.
